modeling.name: MODELING
modeling.desc: We provide high-precision 3D modeling and design services for defense and aerospace projects. Through CAD-based processes, we develop original and applicable solutions at every stage — from conceptual design to production-ready engineering models.

simulation.name: SIMULATION
simulation.desc: We test design performance before production through scenario-based simulations that reflect real operational conditions. This enables early identification of risks, accelerated development cycles, and optimized cost efficiency.

advanced_materials.name: ADVANCED MATERIALS
advanced_materials.desc: We conduct R&D and analysis on advanced composite materials suited to the rigorous demands of the defense industry. We add value to projects with material solutions that optimize the balance of weight, durability, and performance.

ai.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
ai.desc: We develop AI-based algorithms for autonomous systems and intelligent platforms. In areas such as image processing, decision support, and autonomous control, we produce innovative solutions. We provide support with Ozvia, our AI assistant developed for modern businesses and institutions.

pages.urunlerimiz_desc: You have reached the quality page. We are at your service with our off-the-shelf ready products and R&D products.
pages.video_kutuphanesi_desc: Visualize technology: Leverage the power of our animation, simulation, and digital twin applications for your products and services.

seo.default_desc: Discover 3D modeling, simulation, advanced materials, and AI solutions with Volinor.
seo.home_desc: Discover 3D modeling, simulation, and AI solutions with Volinor.
seo.about_desc: Learn more about Volinor Defense and Technology.
seo.video_lib_desc: Our educational and promotional video library.
seo.auth_desc: Sign in to your Volinor account or register.
seo.ai_desc: Our algorithm and autonomy-based AI systems.

about.p1: Volinor Defense and Technology Inc. was founded in Ankara as a software, design, and research center to provide innovative products and R&D solutions in the defense industry and advanced technology sectors.
about.p2: VOLINOR Inc. provides modeling and simulation, analysis, and product development services. In this scope;
about.li2: 3D animation and simulation videos to better communicate, promote, and enhance the reputation of your products both domestically and internationally,

contact.heading: GET IN TOUCH
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully. Thank you!
contact.error: An error occurred while sending your message.

auth.tagline_sub: We offer access to some of our models for our valued visitors for non-commercial use.
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue to your account.
auth.register_subtitle: Enter your details to join the platform.
auth.agreement_1_body: This agreement is made between Volinor Defense Technologies (hereinafter referred to as "Volinor") and the authorized user accessing the platform.
auth.agreement_2_body: The user acknowledges that defense industry projects and data on the platform are subject to national security policies and classified information standards.
auth.agreement_3_body: Sharing any information, document, or model on the platform with third parties or unauthorized entities is strictly prohibited. Violations will result in legal action under national and international legislation.
auth.agreement_4_body: All intellectual property of algorithms, designs, analyses, and datasets on the platform belongs to Volinor. Copying or reverse engineering is prohibited.
auth.agreement_5_body: Volinor reserves the right to log and monitor all user activities on the system in accordance with information security procedures, and to report suspicious situations to relevant security authorities.
auth.agreement_6_body: The platform may only be used within the scope of authorized tasks, R&D activities, and tactical analyses. Access from personal or unauthorized devices is not permitted.
auth.msg_pending_approval: Your account is pending administrator approval. Please try again later.
auth.msg_login_error: An error occurred while signing in.
auth.msg_agreement_required: Please accept the user agreement before proceeding.
auth.msg_register_success: Account created! A verification email has been sent, please check your inbox.

dealerships.dechamps_desc1: Producing high-quality mobility systems since 1994, DeChamps Systems is a global leader in mobile helicopter landing pads.
dealerships.dechamps_desc2: VOLİNOR is the authorized dealer for DeChamps TAHEL Helipad™ tactical helicopter landing pads.
dealerships.penta_desc1: As the distributor for over 40 technology brands in Turkey, Penta provides access to industry-leading products.
dealerships.penta_desc2: Contact us for products from brands like IBM, Asus, HP, Acer, Brother, Canon, and Xerox.
